display.purpose: Hero name (Milo54) only. 96px, line-height 0.9 for visual mass. Responsive: 56px mobile.

headline.purpose: Card titles and hero subtitle in Patrick Hand. Weight from letterform character, not font-weight.

title.purpose: Currently-card section headers, sub-labels inside cards.

body.purpose: All running copy. Max 65ch line length where containers allow.

label.purpose: Pill tags, section labels, annotations, music ticker, percentage readouts.

shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.purpose: Standard resting shadow on all card surfaces. Pink-tinted, barely perceptible.

shadows.name: scrapbook-photo
shadows.purpose: Hero image only. Paired with rotate(-1deg) to evoke a photograph placed on a surface.

shadows.name: rose-glow
shadows.purpose: Scroll-to-top fixed button. Vivid pink glow for a persistent high-contrast element.

shadows.name: lift-hover
shadows.purpose: Like-item hover state. Paired with translateY(-4px).

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Button background, nav link colors, social circle hover.

motion.name: ease-lift
motion.purpose: Like-item hover: background + transform + shadow together.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Single-column layout, hamburger nav, reduced hero name size.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The sole CTA element. Pill-shaped, ink-black on parchment. Should feel like a printed sticker placed on the page.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #111111; color: #fff8f8; border: none; border-radius: 20px; padding: 8px 18px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #333333; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff2d78; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Pill Tag
components.description: Read-only annotation label in the handwritten register. Used for the hero welcome tag and section annotations.
components.css: .ds-pill-tag { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Patrick Hand', cursive; font-size: 13px; color: #ff2d78; background: #fff0f5; border: 1px solid #f7cad6; border-radius: 20px; padding: 4px 12px; width: fit-content; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Primary container. Frosted-paper translucency over grid-paper background. Overflow visible required when carrying chibi or tape decorations.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); border: 1.5px solid #f7cad6; border-radius: 18px; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(255,143,177,0.10); padding: 36px; position: relative; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Patrick Hand', cursive; font-size: 20px; color: #ff2d78; margin-bottom: 16px; display: block; }

components.name: Like Item
components.description: Emoji tile with lift-on-hover. The translateY animation is the defining interaction; it must feel snappy, not bouncy.
components.css: .ds-like-item { background: #fff0f5; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 8px; text-align: center; border: 1px solid #f7cad6; cursor: default; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-like-item:hover { background: #ffd6e7; transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(255,45,120,0.15); } .ds-like-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f7cad6; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-like-emoji { font-size: 24px; display: block; } .ds-like-label { font-size: 11px; color: #555; margin-top: 4px; display: block; }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Reading/watching progress indicator in Currently cards. Rose-to-blush gradient fill on a blush track.
components.html: Shadow Slave95%
components.css: .ds-progress-wrap { margin-bottom: 14px; } .ds-progress-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-progress-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; color: #111111; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-progress-pct { font-size: 11px; color: #ff2d78; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'Patrick Hand', cursive; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-progress-track { width: 100%; height: 5px; background: #f0e0e8; border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-progress-fill { height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff2d78, #ffb3cc); border-radius: 3px; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Sticky 48px bar. Near-opaque (not frosted) so content scrolling beneath it reads cleanly.
components.html:
Milo54
  • home
  • about me
♪ unravel - TK
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 200; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.97); border-bottom: 1px solid #f7cad6; height: 48px; } .ds-nav-inner { padding: 0 5vw; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; } .ds-nav-logo { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px; color: #111111; text-decoration: none; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 24px; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-links a { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #777777; text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 2px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-nav-links a:hover, .ds-nav-links a.active { color: #ff2d78; border-bottom-color: #ff2d78; } .ds-nav-music { font-size: 13px; color: #999999; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Notebook Rings
components.description: 12 fixed rings along the left edge of the viewport. Structural decoration that reads as spiral-bound notebook. aria-hidden, pointer-events none.
components.css: .ds-notebook-rings { position: fixed; left: 12px; top: 0; height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-around; z-index: 100; pointer-events: none; } .ds-ring { width: 20px; height: 20px; border: 3px solid #f7cad6; border-radius: 50%; background: #ffffff; }

components.name: Washi Tape Strip
components.description: Cropped strip of washi-tape-sheet.png positioned above cards. The slight rotation and negative top position are required — they are the design, not tolerances.
components.html: Card with tape
components.css: .ds-card-demo { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); border: 1.5px solid #f7cad6; border-radius: 18px; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(255,143,177,0.10); position: relative; overflow: visible; } .ds-card-tape { position: absolute; top: -10px; left: 30px; width: 120px; height: 24px; object-fit: cover; object-position: 0 -80px; opacity: 0.85; transform: rotate(-1.5deg); pointer-events: none; z-index: 5; }

narrative.overview:
This is a personal space decorated by a specific human at a specific point in time. Every element should feel placed rather than laid out: slightly rotated photos, overlapping tape strips, chibi illustrations peeking from card edges, a grid-paper backdrop that reads 'notebook' before anything is read. The craft is in the deliberate imperfection.

The palette is dominated by a vivid rose with soft pink-tinted surfaces. This is not 'pink because cute.' It is a calling card. The same rose appears on every accent, every label, every hover state. Its consistency is what makes the whole page feel like it belongs to one person.

This system explicitly rejects: slick SaaS portfolio energy (dark-mode glass cards, hero metrics, identical grids), anime fan wiki density (information-first, joyless layouts), and corporate clean (white space for its own sake, neutral type).
keyCharacteristics: Rose as identity, not accent — Scandalous Rose appears on 40-60% of interactive surfaces
Every neutral tinted toward rose — no true white or gray surfaces
Handcrafted markers — washi tape, chibi illustrations, and notebook rings are structural
Gentle asymmetry — hero image rotates -1deg, tape -2 to -8deg; nothing sits perfectly flat
Frosted-paper cards — rgba(255,255,255,0.85) translucency, never full-opacity white

rules.name: The Parchment Rule
rules.body: No surface is pure white (#ffffff) or pure black (#000000). Every neutral is tinted toward rose. If a surface reads as clean or neutral, it does not belong.

rules.name: The One Rose Rule
rules.body: Scandalous Rose is the only hue used for labels, titles, interactive states, and accents. A second accent color breaks the single-voice identity.

rules.name: The Three-Font Rule
rules.body: Exactly three typefaces: Playfair Display, Patrick Hand, Nunito. Adding a fourth dissolves the handcrafted identity.

rules.name: The Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Display (96px) to body (14px) is a 6.9x jump. This is intentional. Do not compress the display size in the name of consistency — the contrast IS the point.

rules.name: The Pink Shadow Rule
rules.body: Content shadows are never neutral gray. Every ambient shadow is tinted toward rose. rgba(0,0,0,x) is reserved for the hero scrapbook photo effect only.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear on surfaces, not on inline elements, text, or decorative images. Chibi illustrations and washi tape have no shadows.

dos: Do tint every neutral toward rose. If it reads as gray, add pink chroma.
Do set overflow: visible on any card carrying a chibi or washi tape decoration.
Do vary card padding by context: 48px hero, 36px standard, 28px dense.
Do rotate all decorative overlays slightly. Tape: -2 to -8 degrees. Hero image: -1 degree.
Do use Scandalous Rose on every interactive label, title, and accent.
Do mark decorative images aria-hidden='true' and provide onerror fallbacks.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion for all transforms and transitions.
Do maintain WCAG AA contrast on all text elements.
donts: Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop-filter blur. Card translucency is rgba background only.
Don't build slick SaaS elements: no dark mode default, no hero metrics, no identical card grids.
Don't design like an anime fan wiki: no information-dense tables, no joyless functional layouts.
Don't go corporate clean: no pure white surfaces, no neutral gray type, no whitespace-as-design.
Don't use neutral gray shadows on content surfaces.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe.
Don't compress the hero display size below 96px on desktop.
